🎯 Shot Sensitivity Analysis

How forgiving is this three-cushion shot? It runs automatically: a 2-D spin scan (side vs top/back) plus 1-D tolerance sweeps for speed, aim and elevation. Opened from the practice game — close this tab anytime, your game is untouched.
